portfolio_metadata.location_preferences: Open to Remote, Greater Seattle Area, Greater Washington State Area

projects.title: AI Architect OS Installation Disc
projects.value_proposition: A stylized web interface for deploying the Architect OS system prompt to bootstrap AI coding agents into a structured engineering workflow.
projects.summary: This project provides a frontend 'installation disc' experience for users to copy an overriding system prompt. The prompt forces an LLM to utilize a .blink/ configuration directory for PRD and stack specifications before writing code. It features a cyber-aesthetic, glassmorphic UI.

act_evaluation.aesthetics: Cyberpunk/glassmorphism vibe, using dark themes and ambient glows to represent an OS terminal environment.
act_evaluation.clarity: Clear, numbered onboarding steps (01 through 04) explaining the operational lifecycle of the prompt.

projects.title: Project Mirror
projects.value_proposition: A dynamic matchmaking and generation engine that transforms fragmented developer aspirations into structured, open-source alternatives to existing proprietary services.
projects.summary: Project Mirror is an infrastructure-level intervention designed to solve structural contribution barriers and proprietary lock-in. It provides a structured, market-aligned index where open projects are explicitly defined by their relationship to existing industry solutions, matching developer talent to open-source alternatives.

act_evaluation.aesthetics: Structured, systematic, and transparent architecture focusing on clear data relationships between talent and open-source infrastructure.
act_evaluation.clarity: High-signal alignment condensing developer options into simple, actionable paths: Join Community, Join Project, or Spawn Competitor.
act_evaluation.tone: Empowering, transformative, and authoritative, aimed at decentralizing software ownership and breaking proprietary monopolies.

projects.title: HTML Artifact Compiler
projects.value_proposition: A generative, AI-driven asset compiler that transforms semantic object prompts into deterministically rendered, exportable HTML artifacts.
projects.summary: This Flutter web tool provides a streamlined interface for compiling and previewing AI-generated UI objects. It features robust local validation and one-click export to clipboard or file, ensuring the generated web assets are perfectly portable and ready for immediate deployment.

act_evaluation.aesthetics: Clean, utilitarian interface emphasizing rapid iteration, with dedicated panels for prompt input and live artifact preview.
act_evaluation.clarity: Highly focused workflow that removes complex knobs to prioritize deterministic output and ease of export.

projects.title: Live Demand Pipeline (Cottage Hill)
projects.value_proposition: A dual-interface live commerce simulator connecting local merchants and consumers through proximity-based dynamic offer dispatching.
projects.summary: This project establishes a real-time localized demand network. It features a Merchant Console for dispatching live promotional offers (e.g., 'Free cookie for the next 5 minutes') and a Consumer Simulator that instantly triggers and renders these offers when proximity thresholds are crossed.

act_evaluation.aesthetics: Real-time, dual-console simulation environment focusing on immediate transactional data.
act_evaluation.clarity: Clear separation of concerns between merchant broadcasting and consumer receiving.

projects.title: Autonomous UI Paradigm
projects.value_proposition: A dynamic, generative compilation engine that decouples interface rendering from manual design cycles, transforming fragmented telemetry data into structured, highly optimized UI variants on the fly.
projects.summary: An infrastructure-level intervention designed to solve 'Monolithic User Journeys' and 'Closed-World Rigidity.' It acts as a generative matrix where interface elements self-optimize based on real-time user friction and market context, eliminating manual design debt.

act_evaluation.aesthetics: Highly dynamic and structural, showcasing automated optimization and generative UI transitions without generic static components.
act_evaluation.clarity: Immediate and actionable insights linking telemetry inputs directly to UI output changes.
